CommitteeSize.description: Committee size for a single conference-year.

area.description: Research area of this conference: 'systems' or 'security'.
area.title: Area

size.description: Number of AE committee members for this conference-year.
size.title: Size

CommitteeSize.title: CommitteeSize

total_members.description: Total AE committee members across all conferences and years (includes duplicates for multi-year service).
total_members.title: Total Members

total_systems.description: Committee members from systems conferences (ATC, EUROSYS, FAST, OSDI, SC, SOSP).
total_systems.title: Total Systems

total_security.description: Committee members from security conferences (ACSAC, CHES, NDSS, PETS, SYSTEX, USENIXSEC, WOOT).
total_security.title: Total Security

total_countries.description: Number of unique countries represented across all committees, e.g. 59.
total_countries.title: Total Countries

total_continents.description: Number of unique continents represented, e.g. 7.
total_continents.title: Total Continents

total_institutions.description: Number of unique institutions represented, e.g. 470.
total_institutions.title: Total Institutions

FailedClassification.description: A committee member whose institution could not be geolocated.

name.description: Full name of the committee member whose affiliation could not be resolved.
name.title: Name

affiliation.description: Raw affiliation string that could not be geolocated or matched to an institution.
affiliation.title: Affiliation

FailedClassification.title: FailedClassification

NameCount.description: A simple name/count pair used for country, continent, and institution tallies.

name.description: Country, continent, or institution name, e.g. 'United States', 'Europe', 'MIT'.
name.title: Name

count.description: Number of AE committee members from this entity.
count.title: Count

NameCount.title: NameCount

description: AE committee geographic and institutional diversity: country, continent, and institution breakdowns.

summary.description: Aggregate summary with totals for members, countries, continents, and institutions.

by_country.description: Member counts by country, split into overall/systems/security. e.g. 'United States': 2103.

by_continent.description: Member counts by continent, split into overall/systems/security.

by_institution.description: Member counts by institution, split into overall/systems/security.

by_year.description: Year-level geographic/institutional breakdowns keyed by category (e.g. 'country', 'continent'), then year, then name → count.
by_year.title: By Year

committee_sizes.description: Committee sizes for each conference-year. One entry per conference-year combination.
committee_sizes.title: Committee Sizes

failed_classifications.description: Members whose affiliation string could not be resolved to a country/institution.
failed_classifications.title: Failed Classifications

title: CommitteeStats
